Where Academics and Individuality Thrive

High Bluff Academy (HBA) provides a holistic, student-centered approach that balances rigorous academics with the flexibility and support needed to excel and gain admission to top-tier colleges

Quality Education, Individualized Learning

Our Programs

High School Programs

Complete high school education at our campus in San Diego or online, tailored to fit each student’s pace and needs.

Online Classes

Flexible online classes designed to complement students’ existing school programs.

F-1 Visa Program for International Students

ESL Program for those with intermediate level English and AP courses to ensure students are ready for top-tier universities.

Summer School

Join our group classes on campus or participate online and learn from anywhere with ease.

Choose The Learning Option That Best Fits Your Needs

In-Person

Safe and welcoming environment with small class sizes and amazing teachers. HBA provides courses tailored to your student’s academic level and supports them through rigorous AP courses.

Hybrid

Attend some classes in person with the ability to add additional classes online. Students can complete their work during the school day with teacher supervision and support.

Virtual

Online courses to fit your student’s needs: live one-on-one classes or self-paced modules. Tutoring sessions available on demand.

Announcement

High Bluff Academy (HBA) provides a holistic, student-centered approach that balances rigorous academics with the flexibility and support needed to excel and gain admission to top-tier colleges.

Our Mission

Helping Students Become Independent Learners

At High Bluff Academy, we aim to nurture lifelong, independent learners equipped to face life’s challenges with confidence. By fostering self-reliance, we prepare students not just for college—but for life.

Read our Rave Reviews!

View All

Core Strengths That Defines Our School

Empowering Environment

A nurturing school community for students rebuilding confidence and discovering their strengths. Our supportive approach fosters personal growth, helping every student thrive academically and socially. Together, we create a foundation for lifelong success and self-belief.

High Bluff Academy has partnered with Parchment to order and send your transcript and other credentials securely.
